title: Faithfuled WTHIT
description: Addon for Faithful x32 with WTHIT support
body:
About

This is an addon for Faithful x32 that adds stylized textures for WTHIT. For the addon to work properly, it must be moved above the mod resources in the game's resource packs menu. If you want to use the stylized overlay background, in the 45 settings you must create a new theme and specify the nine_pach type.

Usage

You are free to use this resource pack as you wish, based on moral principles. If you post this resource pack on third-party resources or include it in your modpack, please provide a link to this page.

Custom WTHIT themes

Starting with version 1.1, the resourcepack adds two different backgrounds for WTHIT overlay, rounded and squared. To use these backgrounds, you need to create a new theme in WTHIT settings with texture type ninepath, and enter faithfuled_rounded or faithfuled_squared as the texture name.

Survey

I'm thinking of merging my addons, but I want to know your opinion, please take this survey, it's just a minute of your time.
